title: Hook Metrics
description: Per-vertical selector card content: headline discrepancy, consequence, trust cue, and score.

discrepancy_headline.description: One-line hook: the core data problem (e.g., '7 broken metrics across 3 dashboards')

trust_cue.description: Trust signal (e.g., 'Reviewed by Jane Smith, VP Analytics')

score.description: Current audit score for this vertical

severity_level.description: Visual urgency level for selector card rendering
